result: Completed comprehensive competitive analysis of 8 AI presentation tools (Gamma, Tome, Beautiful.ai, Canva AI, Google Slides AI, Microsoft Copilot, Slidebean, Pitch). Deliverable includes feature/pricing comparison tables, quality assessments, target audience matrix, and strategic recommendations for SlideHeroes positioning. Key finding: SlideHeroes' Pyramid Principle methodology differentiation is a unique market position not currently served by competitors.
